exam_name: CIA Exam Part 1 — Foundations of Internal Auditing

testing_centers.notes: Schedule at Pearson VUE testing centers worldwide. Online proctored option available via Pearson VUE OnVUE. CIA eligibility must be confirmed by IIA before scheduling.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match IIA registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, or reference materials permitted. Calculator provided on-screen for applicable parts. CIA candidates must pass all three parts within 4 years of initial registration. Specialty certifications are standalone and do not require CIA. All candidates must agree to IIA's Code of Ethics.
renewal_options: 40 CPE hours required annually for CIA maintenance. Specialty certifications also require 40 CPE hours per year. CPE must be relevant to internal auditing. Maintain active IIA membership for reduced exam pricing.

prerequisites.description: IIA membership required; bachelor's degree or equivalent experience

retake_policy.notes: 90-day waiting period between failed attempts for the same part. Retake fees are the same as initial attempt fees ($370 member / $570 non-member). CIA candidates have a maximum of 4 years from initial registration to pass all parts.

official_study_resources.title: IIA CIA Learning System
official_study_resources.notes: Official IIA study materials including textbooks and online resources

official_study_resources.title: IIA Practice Tests (Pearson VUE)
official_study_resources.notes: Practice exams available through Pearson VUE prep materials

aliases: cia exam part 1 foundations of internal auditing
